headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' https://vercel.live https://*.vercel.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; img-src 'self' data: blob: https://picsum.photos; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; connect-src 'self' https://*.vercel.com; frame-ancestors *; upgrade-insecure-requests;
